rulings.Case Title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. EDWARD KELM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 01, 2020, line 1. DEFENDANT EDWARD KELM MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Counsel to prepare order. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MARY BETH STEADMAN VS. WILLIAM WINTERS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant'S Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 01, 2020, line 2. DEFENDANT WILLIAM WINTERS MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant'S Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment is continued to September 2, 2020 on Court's own motion. =(501/CFH)
